; the UI normalizes it to Bluetooth MAC: ; the UI normalizes it to Bluetooth MAC format.
Add Device and Enable Live Polling: Add Device and Enable Live Polling
Add this many seconds of overlap to avoi: Добавляет такое число секунд перекрытия, чтобы избежать пропусков на границах страниц.
Apply this history window to every selec: Apply this history window to every selected Fleet Trend chart.
BM200, BM200 Pro, BM300, and BM300 Pro a: BM200, BM200 Pro, BM300, and BM300 Pro app families all expose lead-acid and lithium setup paths. Lead-acid supports regular, AGM, EFB, GEL, and custom. Lithium supports lithium and custom. Custom profiles can use the intelligent algorithm or a voltage-to-SoC curve. The gateway now generates the device ID automatically and assigns the visual badges from the battery and vehicle metadata you choose below.
BM200/BM6 protocol state order: Critical: BM200/BM6 protocol state order: Critical, Low, Normal, Charging, Floating. Current state: Normal.
Imports dense supported-device history p: Периодически импортирует плотную историю поддерживаемых устройств и после долгих периодов офлайн.
Keep BM300 Pro/BM7 archive imports separ: Оставляет импорт архива BM300 Pro/BM7 под отдельным включением.
Caps each automatic or manual BM300 Pro/: Ограничивает каждую автоматическую или ручную синхронизацию истории BM300 Pro/BM7. Настроенный максимум основан на наблюдаемом окне селектора 883 записи и заявленном хранении 72 дня.
Caps each automatic or manual BM200/BM6: Ограничивает каждую автоматическую или ручную синхронизацию истории BM200/BM6. Одна страница покрывает около 8 часов 32 минут.
Choose how many batteries can appear on: Choose how many batteries can appear on one overview image.
Choose how many monitored batteries stay: Choose how many monitored batteries stay visible before the overview pages horizontally on larger fleets.

Choose the language used by the local we: Choose the language used by the local web interface.
Choose the light or dark visual style fo: Choose the light or dark visual style for generated frame images.
Choose which chart images the frame expo: Choose which chart images the frame export should generate.
Choose which network interface the web s: Choose which network interface the web server listens on, for example 0.0.0.0 or 127.0.0.1.
Choose which retained time window charts: Choose which retained time window charts should open with by default.
Controls how long the gateway searches f: Controls how long the gateway searches for each Bluetooth device before giving up.
Controls how long the gateway waits for: Controls how long the gateway waits for a Bluetooth connection to complete.
Device added. First poll already running: Устройство добавлено. Первый опрос уже выполняется.
Disabled until the BM7 history decoder i: Отключено до реализации декодера истории BM7
Edit the same battery taxonomy exposed b: Edit the same battery taxonomy exposed by the official app, including custom curves. Battery and vehicle badges are assigned automatically.
Expose generated frame images through a: Expose generated frame images through a Raspberry Pi USB gadget mass storage drive. This remains inactive until the USB gadget hardware path is available.

JPEG is the safest format for most digit: JPEG is the safest format for most digital picture frames.
Keep detailed raw readings for this many: Keep detailed raw readings for this many days before pruning.
Keeps discovery messages on the broker s: Keeps discovery messages on the broker so Home Assistant can rediscover the gateway after restarts.
Keeps the last known gateway and battery: Keeps the last known gateway and battery state on the broker for new subscribers.

Publishes Home Assistant-compatible MQTT: Publishes Home Assistant-compatible MQTT discovery messages so entities can appear automatically.
Raw rows stay available, but tucked behi: Raw rows stay available, but tucked behind a lower-priority operational panel so chart insight leads the page.

Set how often the gateway performs a ful: Set how often the gateway performs a full collection cycle.

Stable gateway identity. Renaming it als: Stable gateway identity. Renaming it also renames stored history; choose a unique ID that is not already used by another device or old history.

This becomes the stable device identifie: This becomes the stable device identifier Home Assistant uses for the gateway device.
This is the root topic under which gatew: This is the root topic under which gateway and device state messages are published.

This page keeps checking the web interfa: This page keeps checking the web interface and redirects when the gateway is online again.
